name: bun-install
description: Install CLI commands from a local workspace or an NPM package into Bun's global package store. Supports command selection and Bun runtime override. Excellent for dev builds of MCPs and other tools. Automatically resolves dependencies within your project's workspace.

scripts.check: bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun test
scripts.publish:next: bun run check && bun publish --tag next
scripts.publish:latest: bun run check && bun publish --tag latest
scripts.release: bun run check && git push --follow-tags origin HEAD
scripts.version:patch: bun run check && bun pm version patch
scripts.version:minor: bun run check && bun pm version minor
scripts.version:major: bun run check && bun pm version major
scripts.version:prerelease: bun run check && bun pm version prerelease
